label: Stability AI
description: Generate images using Stable Diffusion models via the Stability AI REST API.

form.title: Connect Stability AI
form.subtitle: Paste your Stability AI API key to start generating images with Stable Diffusion.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Stability AI API key (starts with `sk-`). Generate one in seconds from the Stability AI platform — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Stability AI API key

1. Go to [platform.stability.ai](https://platform.stability.ai) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. Click your avatar or name in the top-right corner and select **Account**.
3. Open the **API Keys** tab.
4. Click **Create API Key**. Give it a name like `Anton`.
5. Copy the generated key — it starts with `sk-` and is shown only once. Store it somewhere safe.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Keys are scoped to your account and billed against your credit balance. Monitor usage in the **Billing** tab.
- If you lose the key, revoke it from the same **API Keys** page and generate a new one.
- Free accounts receive a small credit grant; paid plans add more credits. Check [pricing](https://platform.stability.ai/pricing) if you hit limits.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Stability AI API key from platform.stability.ai → Account → API Keys.

fields.name: api_base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you're using a custom or regional endpoint. Leave as default for most users.
